# Chess Puzzles

> An Android chess puzzle game (Kotlin + Jetpack Compose, multi-module) that serves real tactical puzzles from the Lichess Open Database. Find the best move; the opponent replies automatically; your solved count and streak persist on-device. Built and tested entirely from the CLI with 100% line coverage.

Chess Puzzles is open-source (Apache-2.0), created by Babak Bandpey / Cocode. The codebase splits into a pure-JVM `:core` module (chess rules via chesslib, the `PuzzleSession` state machine, CSV parsing) and an Android `:app` module (a custom Jetpack Compose Canvas board, `PuzzleViewModel`, DataStore persistence).

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/cocodedk/chess-puzzles/blob/main/README.md): overview, quickstart, modules
- [Architecture](https://github.com/cocodedk/chess-puzzles/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): modules, the `:core` contract, testing approach
- [Setup](https://github.com/cocodedk/chess-puzzles/blob/main/docs/SETUP.md): CLI toolchain, build, and emulator commands
- [Data](https://github.com/cocodedk/chess-puzzles/blob/main/docs/DATA.md): puzzle pipeline and attribution
- [Plan](https://github.com/cocodedk/chess-puzzles/blob/main/docs/PLAN.md): full architecture and build plan
- [Contributing](https://github.com/cocodedk/chess-puzzles/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): setup, git hooks, PR checklist
